title: selaginella crassipes
intro: Selaginella crassipes, also known as Spike Moss, is a species of evergreen flowering plant in the genus Selaginella, commonly found in tropical regions. It has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Spike Moss include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Selaginella crassipes is often used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
